_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of key decision-support needs and questions to drive prioritization of data efforts.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to prioritize data quality investments based on business impact, focusing remediation efforts on data quality issues that most directly affect organizational decision-making and operational outcomes.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-001 (OP, cosine: 0.548), SP-K-004 (SP, cosine: 0.532).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.620). Shared vocabulary: [data, decision, efforts]. DCWF-only terms [drive, key, knowledge, needs, prioritization, questions] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, affect, based, business, directly, focusing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.888, R=0.875). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Knowledge of key decision-support needs and questions to drive prioritization of" and "Ability to prioritize data quality investments based on business impact, focusin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.592 ≈ STS 0.620 (gap 0.028). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, decision, efforts] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.6%. Shared tokens: [data, decision, efforts]. DCWF-only: [drive, key, knowledge, needs, prioritization, questions]. WIDAI-only: [ability, affect, based, business, directly, focusing].
